transactions.description: Detroit Tigers placed 3B Zach McKinstry on the 10-day injured list retroactive to April 16, 2026. Left hip/abdominal inflammation.
Detroit Tigers recalled 2B Hao-Yu  Lee from Toledo Mud Hens.
Detroit Tigers placed LHP Bailey Horn on the 60-day injured list. Left elbow arthroscopy recovery.
Detroit Tigers optioned LHP Enmanuel De Jesus to Toledo Mud Hens.
Detroit Tigers selected the contract of RHP Burch Smith from Toledo Mud Hens.
